entries.source: "Explain recursion in JavaScript"
entries.value: "Forklar rekursjon i JavaScript"

entries.source: "Help debug this error"
entries.value: "Hjelp meg med å feilsøke denne feilen"

entries.source: "Teach me Python loops"
entries.value: "Lær meg Python-løkker"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Code Tutor on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: En praktisk veiledning i å bruke Kodeveileder på inspir til STEM læring, med prompter, studiesløyfer og tryggere KI-vaner.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: En sterkere studiesløyfe

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: KI-veileder

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Be om en liten første steg heller enn en endelige svar.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Spør KI å sjekk din resonnement, ikke bare result.

entries.source: Beginner and intermediate programmers who need explanations, debugging help, or project coaching.
entries.value: Nybegynnere og viderekomne programmerere som trenger forklaringer, hjelp med feilsøking eller veiledning i prosjekter.

entries.source: Code Tutor
entries.value: Kodelærer

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Kodeveileder Feller Learning Programmering By Building er en fokusert way å bruk KI for læring i stedet for passive svarinnsamling. modus er bygget rundt en spesifikk job: Forstå kode, feilsøk errors, lær begreper, og bygg liten prosjekts steg by steg.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Kodeveileder Feller Learning Programmering By Building: praktisk veiledning

entries.source: Explain the bug.
entries.value: Forklar feilen.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Avslutt by skriving idea back fra hukommelse.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompter å prøve

entries.source: Start the live mode at Code Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Start live-modusen i Kodeveileder. Hvis du vil ha et nærliggende læringsformat, prøv Prosjektcoach. For et bredere blikk på plattformen kan du lese hva en KI-læringspartner bør gjøre for alle.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell modus hva du er prøver å lær eller produsere.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference viser up in flow. Instead of ett giant response, beste økter gå gjennom en loop: set en mål, prøv noe, get tilbakemelding, reparer svak spot, og velg neste action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. En general chatbot kan svar almost anything, but en læringsmodus gives samtale en shape. Det nudges du toward typen thinking, øving, tilbakemelding, eller exploration som hjelper idea stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Veilederen spør hva du forventer at koden skal gjøre, og bruker deretter små eksempler og tester for å få deg til å forstå hvordan den fungerer.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: This er samme habit behind studying med KI uten cheating deg selv: hold elev active. KI er most nyttig når det gives du tilbakemelding on din thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Denne modusen er spesielt nyttig for elever som vil:

entries.source: Try a small fix.
entries.value: Prøv en liten retting.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prøv steget med egne ord.

entries.source: Understand the concept.
entries.value: Forstå begrepet.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Bruk Kodeveileder når du vil ha en økt som starter raskt, men fortsatt tilpasser seg deg. Første mål er ikke å høres imponerende ut. Første mål er å få neste steg til å føles mulig.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hva denne modusen hjelper med

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Hvor du går videre

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Du kan also start med en rough version of din ekte problem. En messy første prompt er fine. økt kan clarify nivå, målgruppe, frist, og style once du begin.
